EEGCoordinateSystemDescription: Template electrode coordinates from the g.tec gHIamp_64ch extended 10-20 montage XML used for g.SCARABEO sessions. The source montage coordinates are normalized to radius 1 and were scaled by 100 to express approximate template coordinates in millimeters. EEG063 and EEG064 correspond to mastoid electrodes A1 and A2 in the source montage.
